subcodes.first_line: O Javád! The missive which His honor 'Alí-i-Akbar, upon him be the Glory of God, had written unto thee was presented to this Servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد مکتوبی که جناب علی قبل اکبر علیه بهآء الله بشما نوشته بودند عبد حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice and wrath of God
